message.reasoning_content:

Looking at the existing files:
- site/index.html (page 1) - already exists with basic structure
- _raw/web-001-home.prompt.txt - the prompt for stage 1
- _raw/web-001-home.response.json - the response from stage 1
- _raw/web-001-home.txt - the text version of stage 1 response

For stage 2 (web-002-backlink), I need to:
1. Create site/page-2.html
2. Link page 2 back to page 1 (index.html)
3. Ensure page 1 remains intact

The validator checks:
- page-2-links-index: link_integrity (page 2 must link to index)
- all-html-parse: syntax (both pages must be valid HTML)

I need to create site/page-2.html with:
- A title
- Main content
- A link back to index.html (page 1)
- Valid HTML structure

Let me create the JSON response with the new file.
